articles.title: Kimi K3 登顶Artificial Analysis全球第三，2.8万亿参数开源模型引美股震荡
articles.title_en: Kimi K3 Ranks 3rd Globally on Artificial Analysis—2.8 Trillion Parameter Open-Source Model Shakes US Stocks
articles.summary: 月之暗面Kimi K3在Artificial Analysis智能指数评分57分，全球第三，仅次于Claude Fable 5（60分）和GPT-5.6 Sol。Frontend Code Arena以1679分登顶。纳指100早盘一度重挫2.7%，高盛警告「算力扩张时代」或已走到尽头。
articles.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 scored 57 on Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index, ranking 3rd globally behind Claude Fable 5 (60) and GPT-5.6 Sol. #1 on Frontend Code Arena with 1679 points. Nasdaq 100 fell 2.7% in early trading. Goldman Sachs warns the compute expansion era may be ending.
articles.source: 华尔街见闻 / 凤凰网科技
articles.content: 7月17日凌晨，月之暗面推出新一代大模型Kimi K3，2.8万亿参数，全球首个开源的3万亿级模型。在Artificial Analysis智能指数上，K3以57分位列全球第三，仅次于Claude Fable 5的60分和GPT-5.6 Sol。Frontend Code Arena上，它以1679分登顶，超越Fable 5的1631和GPT-5.6 Sol的1618。K3的发布引发全球科技股震荡——纳指100早盘一度重挫2.7%，英伟达领跌科技七巨头。高盛将市场下跌定义为「去杠杆事件」，认为「算力扩张时代」或已接近尾声。摩根士丹利则认为，K3标志着中国大模型在规模、性能和定价三方面全面追赶美国领先者。
articles.content_en: On July 17, Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a 2.8 trillion parameter model—the world's first open-source 3-trillion-scale model. On Artificial Analysis' Intelligence Index, K3 scored 57, ranking 3rd globally. On Frontend Code Arena, it topped with 1679 points. The launch triggered a global tech stock rout—Nasdaq 100 fell 2.7% in early trading. Goldman Sachs called it a 'de-leveraging event.'
key_points: Kimi K3 2.8万亿参数，全球首个开源3万亿级模型
Artificial Analysis全球第三，Frontend Code Arena登顶
纳指100早盘一度重挫2.7%，高盛警告算力扩张时代或结束
大摩：中国大模型在规模、性能、定价三方面全面追赶
key_points_en: Kimi K3: 2.8T parameters, first open-source 3T-scale model
3rd globally on Artificial Analysis, #1 on Frontend Code Arena
Nasdaq 100 fell 2.7%, Goldman warns compute era may be ending
Morgan Stanley: China LLMs catching up on scale, performance, pricing

articles.title: 习近平出席WAIC 2026开幕式宣布成立WAICO，29个创始成员国签署《上海协定》
articles.title_en: Xi Jinping Attends WAIC 2026, Announces WAICO with 29 Founding Members Signing 'Shanghai Agreement'
articles.summary: 7月18日，习近平主席在WAIC 2026主旨演讲中宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）——全球首个AI政府间国际组织。29个创始成员国签署《上海协定》，总部设在上海。同日国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》8大行动。
articles.summary_en: On July 18, President Xi Jinping announced the World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO)—the world's first intergovernmental AI organization—with 29 founding members signing the 'Shanghai Agreement,' HQ in Shanghai. The NDRC also released an 8-point action plan.
articles.content: 7月18日上午，WAIC 2026迎来最重磅时刻——国家主席习近平在主旨演讲中正式宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）。29个创始成员国——包括中国、法国、德国、新加坡、阿联酋、巴西、南非、印度尼西亚等——现场签署了《上海协定》。WAICO总部设在上海，是全球首个AI领域的政府间国际组织，职能涵盖AI治理规则协调、技术标准互认、安全框架共建。习近平强调，WAICO的成立标志着「人类在人工智能领域从各自为政走向共同治理」。同日，国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》，提出智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、优质数据供给等8大行动，目标到2028年算力成本降低50%以上。
articles.content_en: On the morning of July 18, WAIC 2026 saw its most significant moment—President Xi Jinping formally announced the establishment of the World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO). 29 founding members signed the 'Shanghai Agreement' on site. WAICO, headquartered in Shanghai, is the world's first intergovernmental AI organization. The NDRC also released an 8-point action plan targeting a 50%+ reduction in computing costs by 2028.
key_points: 习近平宣布成立WAICO，29个创始成员国签署《上海协定》
全球首个AI政府间国际组织，总部设在上海
国家发改委发布8大行动计划，目标2028年算力成本降50%
习近平：WAICO标志着人类AI从各自为政走向共同治理
key_points_en: Xi announces WAICO with 29 founding members signing Shanghai Agreement
World's first intergovernmental AI organization, HQ in Shanghai
NDRC releases 8-point action plan, targeting 50%+ compute cost reduction by 2028
Xi: WAICO marks transition from fragmented to shared AI governance

articles.title: WAIC 2026国产超节点集体亮相——华为昇腾950真机首展，算力竞赛进入「系统级较量」
articles.title_en: National AI Supernodes Debut at WAIC 2026—Huawei Ascend 950 Physical First, Computing Competition Enters 'System-Level' Phase
articles.summary: WAIC 2026张江「芯算融合馆」超节点密集亮相：华为昇腾950真机首展（1024卡/1 EFLOPS），燧原云燧ESL64-O、沐曦曦景S600、摩尔线程夸娥万卡集群纷纷亮相。华泰证券称2026年为「国产超节点元年」。
articles.summary_en: WAIC 2026's 'Chip-Compute Fusion Hall' in Zhangjiang saw a deluge of supernode unveilings: Huawei Ascend 950 physical debut (1024 cards/1 EFLOPS), Enflame ESL64-O, M-Xing S600, Moore Threads Kua-e 10K-cluster. Huatai Securities calls 2026 the 'Year of National Supernodes.'
articles.source: 凤凰网科技 / 华尔街见闻 / 36氪
articles.content: 2026世界人工智能大会张江科学会堂一万平米的「芯算融合馆」里，百余家芯片企业同台竞技。华为昇腾950超节点（Atlas 950 SuperPoD）首次以真机亮相，1024张昇腾卡高速互联，提供1 EFLOPS FP8算力，256TB全局统一内存编址空间。燧原科技首发云燧ESL64-O超节点，沐曦股份发布曦景S600超节点（64卡「三零设计」零线缆），摩尔线程展示夸娥万卡级集群。华泰证券将2026年称为「国产超节点元年」，预计2028年市场规模有望达到3414亿元。中兴通讯联合曦智科技、壁仞科技等多家国产GPU厂商打造了Matrix超节点，斩获WAIC SAIL奖。
articles.content_en: WAIC 2026's 10,000 sqm 'Chip-Compute Fusion Hall' in Zhangjiang featured over 100 chip companies. Huawei's Ascend 950 SuperPoD made its physical debut—1,024 Ascend cards with 1 EFLOPS FP8 and 256TB unified memory. Enflame debuted its ESL64-O, M-Xing released the S600, and Moore Threads showed its Kua-e 10K cluster. Huatai Securities calls 2026 the 'Year of National Supernodes.'
key_points: 华为昇腾950超节点真机首展：1024卡/1 EFLOPS/256TB统一内存
燧原、沐曦、摩尔线程等国产GPU厂商超节点密集亮相
华泰证券：2026年为国产超节点元年，2028年市场规模3414亿
中兴联合多家国产GPU打造Matrix超节点，获WAIC SAIL奖
key_points_en: Huawei Ascend 950 SuperPoD: 1,024 cards, 1 EFLOPS, 256TB unified memory
Enflame, M-Xing, Moore Threads debut supernode systems
Huatai: 2026 is Year of National Supernodes, RMB 341.4B market by 2028
ZTE + multiple GPU makers build Matrix supernode, wins WAIC SAIL award

articles.title: 智谱AI半年ARR激增至10亿美元，5个月增长15倍，商业化速度超Anthropic
articles.title_en: Zhipu AI Hits $1B ARR in 5 Months, 15x Growth—Commercialization Outpaces Anthropic
articles.summary: 智谱AI的年度经常性收入（ARR）在5个月内从1亿美元飙升至10亿美元，增长15倍。此前投资人预测智谱需至2026年底才能实现10-15亿美元ARR目标。智谱GLM-5.2开源首日即完成八大国产算力平台全适配。
articles.summary_en: Zhipu AI's ARR surged from $100M to $1B in just 5 months—15x growth. Previously, investors predicted Zhipu would reach $1-1.5B ARR by end of 2026. Zhipu's GLM-5.2 completed Day-0 adaptation across 8 domestic computing platforms.
articles.content: 截至2026年7月，智谱AI的年度经常性收入（ARR）已达10亿美元，从1亿美元到10亿美元仅用5个月，增长15倍。这一增长速度超越了海外Anthropic（后者从1亿到10亿ARR耗时15个月）。此前投资人预测智谱ARR需至2026年底才能达到10-15亿美元，实际进度远超预期。智谱GLM-5.2开源首日即完成了与华为昇腾、平头哥、摩尔线程、寒武纪、昆仑芯、沐曦、海光、壁仞八大国产算力平台的全适配，实现「Day 0适配」。另有报道称Meta正与Anthropic洽谈向后者出租算力，拟进军云计算市场，合作期限两年价值最高可达100亿美元。
articles.content_en: As of July 2026, Zhipu AI's ARR reached $1B, growing from $100M to $1B in just 5 months—15x growth. This surpasses Anthropic's pace (15 months from $100M to $1B ARR). Zhipu's GLM-5.2 completed Day-0 adaptation across 8 domestic computing platforms. Separately, Meta is reportedly in talks to lease computing power to Anthropic in a deal potentially worth up to $10B over 2 years.
key_points: 智谱AI ARR 5个月从1亿美元飙升至10亿美元，增长15倍
增速超越Anthropic（15个月达10亿ARR）
GLM-5.2开源首日即完成八大国产算力平台适配
Meta拟向Anthropic出租算力，两年最高100亿美元
key_points_en: Zhipu AI ARR surges from $100M to $1B in 5 months, 15x growth
Outpaces Anthropic (15 months to $1B ARR)
GLM-5.2 completes Day-0 adaptation across 8 domestic platforms
Meta in talks to lease compute to Anthropic, up to $10B over 2 years

articles.title: OpenAI发布Codex Micro——230美元机械键盘，首款消费级AI硬件产品
articles.title_en: OpenAI Launches Codex Micro—$230 Mechanical Keypad, First Consumer AI Hardware
articles.summary: OpenAI推出Codex Micro，一款售价230美元的AI编程机械键盘，配备专用按键用于代码补全、生成和调试，面向开发者群体。这是OpenAI首款消费级硬件产品。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI introduced Codex Micro, a $230 mechanical keypad for AI coding with dedicated keys for code completion, generation, and debugging—the company's first consumer hardware product.
articles.content: OpenAI推出了Codex Micro，一款专为AI编程设计的机械键盘，售价230美元。该键盘配备专用按键，一键触发代码补全、生成和调试等功能，面向专业开发者群体。这是OpenAI从纯软件公司向硬件领域延伸的重要一步。Codex Micro的推出正值OpenAI面临来自Anthropic Claude Code（AI编程工具市场54%份额）和DeepSeek V4 Pro（超低价开源编程模型）的激烈竞争。
articles.content_en: OpenAI launched Codex Micro, a $230 mechanical keypad designed for AI coding with dedicated keys for code completion, generation, and debugging—marking the company's first foray into consumer hardware. The launch comes as OpenAI faces fierce competition from Anthropic's Claude Code (54% AI coding tool market share) and DeepSeek V4 Pro.
key_points: OpenAI首款消费级硬件：Codex Micro机械键盘，售价230美元
专用按键实现代码补全、生成、调试一键触发
OpenAI从纯软件向硬件领域延伸
面临Anthropic Claude Code（54%份额）和DeepSeek的竞争
key_points_en: OpenAI's first consumer hardware: Codex Micro keypad, $230
Dedicated keys for code completion, generation, debugging
OpenAI extends from pure software to hardware
Faces competition from Claude Code (54% share) and DeepSeek

articles.title: Google NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook，向AI Pro用户开放云电脑访问
articles.title_en: Google Rebrands NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook, Opens Cloud Computer to AI Pro Users
articles.summary: Google将AI笔记工具NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook，归入Gemini品牌体系。同时向AI Pro用户扩展云电脑访问权限，允许在云端运行更复杂的AI工作负载。
articles.summary_en: Google rebrands NotebookLM as Gemini Notebook, integrating it under the Gemini brand. It also expands cloud computer access to AI Pro users, enabling more complex AI workloads in the cloud.
articles.content: Google宣布将AI笔记和研究工具NotebookLM正式更名为Gemini Notebook，将其纳入Gemini品牌统一管理。新名称反映了Google将AI研究工具与核心Gemini品牌深度整合的战略。同时，Google向AI Pro用户扩展了云电脑访问权限，允许用户在云端运行更复杂的AI工作负载。这一举措是Google在AI工具领域与OpenAI ChatGPT Work和Anthropic Claude竞争的最新动作。
articles.content_en: Google announced the rebranding of NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook, integrating the AI research tool under the unified Gemini brand. The move reflects Google's strategy of consolidating AI tools under the Gemini umbrella. Google also expanded cloud computer access to AI Pro users, enabling more complex AI workloads in the cloud.
key_points: NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook，归入Gemini品牌体系
向AI Pro用户开放云电脑访问权限
Google整合AI工具品牌，应对OpenAI和Anthropic竞争
key_points_en: NotebookLM rebranded as Gemini Notebook, under Gemini brand
Cloud computer access expanded to AI Pro users
Google consolidates AI tools to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic

articles.title: 微软CEO纳德拉警告：企业使用AI模型正在「付费两次」——为Token买单，也为交出核心知识买单
articles.title_en: Microsoft CEO Nadella Warns Enterprises 'Pay Twice' for AI—Once for Tokens, Once for Handing Over Core Knowledge
articles.summary: 微软CEO Satya Nadella发文警告，企业使用OpenAI和Anthropic的模型正在「付费两次」：一次为Token付费，一次为交出专有知识付费。Palantir CEO Alex Karp也呼应，称企业客户对AI供应商「怒不可遏」。
articles.summary_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella warns enterprises using OpenAI and Anthropic models are 'paying twice': once for tokens, once for handing over proprietary know-how. Palantir CEO Alex Karp echoes, saying enterprise clients are privately 'livid' about AI vendors.
articles.content: 微软CEO Satya Nadella发表博客文章，警告企业使用AI模型正在「付费两次」：一次为Token付费，一次为交出专有知识付费。他指出「模型从'废气'中学习——用户的提示词、Agent使用的工具、尤其是模型出错时用户的修正——每一次修正都被蒸馏成机构知识」。Palantir CEO Alex Karp在CNBC上呼应，称企业客户私下对AI供应商「怒不可遏」。前白宫AI与加密沙皇David Sacks也在All In播客中表示，OpenAI和Anthropic已形成双头垄断。
articles.content_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella published a blog post warning that enterprises using AI models are 'paying twice': once for tokens, once for handing over proprietary know-how. Palantir CEO Alex Karp echoed this on CNBC, saying enterprise clients are privately 'livid' about AI vendors. David Sacks said OpenAI and Anthropic have formed a duopoly.
key_points: Nadella：企业使用AI模型在「付费两次」——Token费+知识费
模型从用户提示词、工具使用和修正中学习机构知识
Palantir CEO：企业客户对AI供应商「怒不可遏」
前白宫AI沙皇David Sacks：OpenAI和Anthropic已形成双头垄断
key_points_en: Nadella: Enterprises 'pay twice' for AI—tokens + knowledge
Models learn from user prompts, tool usage, and corrections
Palantir CEO: Enterprise clients are 'livid' about AI vendors
David Sacks: OpenAI and Anthropic have formed a duopoly

articles.title: Thinking Machines Lab发布Inkling——9750亿参数开放权重模型，Apache 2.0许可，在美国开放权重模型中排名第一
articles.title_en: Thinking Machines Lab Releases Inkling—975B Parameter Open-Weight Model Under Apache 2.0, #1 Among US Open-Weight Models
articles.summary: Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab发布Inkling，9750亿参数MoE架构，Apache 2.0许可。Artificial Analysis综合评分41，在所有美国开放权重模型中排名第一。公司成立不到18个月即交出旗舰模型。
articles.summary_en: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab released Inkling, a 975B parameter MoE model under Apache 2.0. Artificial Analysis composite score of 41, #1 among all US open-weight models. The company delivered its flagship model in under 18 months.
articles.content: Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab（成立不到18个月）发布了首款旗舰模型Inkling——9750亿参数MoE架构，Apache 2.0开放权重许可。在Artificial Analysis综合评分中，Inkling以41分在所有美国开放权重模型中排名第一。Inkling的发布标志着从OpenAI离职的Murati正式在开源AI领域开辟了新战场。公司由a16z、Nvidia、Accel联合投资，估值120亿美元。Nvidia的参与格外引人注目——这是Nvidia对OpenAI离职高管的最大投资。
articles.content_en: Thinking Machines Lab, founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati less than 18 months ago, released its first flagship model—Inkling, a 975B parameter MoE model under Apache 2.0. With a composite score of 41 on Artificial Analysis, it ranks #1 among all US open-weight models. The company is backed by a16z, Nvidia, and Accel at a $12B valuation.
key_points: Thinking Machines Lab发布Inkling：9750亿参数MoE，Apache 2.0
Artificial Analysis评分41，美国开放权重模型排名第一
Mira Murati创立，公司成立不到18个月
a16z/Nvidia/Accel投资，估值120亿美元
key_points_en: Thinking Machines Lab releases Inkling: 975B MoE, Apache 2.0
#1 among US open-weight models on Artificial Analysis (score 41)
Founded by Mira Murati, company less than 18 months old
Backed by a16z/Nvidia/Accel at $12B valuation

articles.title: 习近平出席WAIC 2026开幕式并宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO），29个创始成员国签署协定
articles.title_en: Xi Jinping Attends WAIC 2026 Opening, Announces World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO) with 29 Founding Members
articles.summary: 7月18日，WAIC 2026进入第二天，习近平主席在主旨演讲中宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）——全球首个AI领域的政府间国际组织，29个创始成员国现场签署《上海协定》。WAICO总部设在上海，旨在推动全球AI治理规则协调、技术标准互认与安全框架共建。
articles.summary_en: On July 18, Day 2 of WAIC 2026, President Xi Jinping announced the establishment of the World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO)—the world's first intergovernmental organization in AI, with 29 founding members signing the 'Shanghai Agreement' on site. HQ in Shanghai, aiming to coordinate global AI governance rules, technical standards, and safety frameworks.
articles.source: 新华社 / WAIC 2026 组委会
articles.content: 7月18日上午，WAIC 2026迎来最重磅时刻——国家主席习近平在主旨演讲中正式宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）。29个创始成员国——包括中国、法国、德国、新加坡、阿联酋、巴西、南非、印度尼西亚等——现场签署了《上海协定》。WAICO将设在上海，是全球首个AI领域的政府间国际组织，职能涵盖AI治理规则协调、技术标准互认、安全框架共建、人才交流与能力建设。习近平强调，WAICO的成立标志着「人类在人工智能领域从各自为政走向共同治理」，中国愿与各国共享AI发展红利。
articles.content_en: On the morning of July 18, WAIC 2026 saw its most significant moment—President Xi Jinping formally announced the establishment of the World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO) in his keynote speech. 29 founding members—including China, France, Germany, Singapore, UAE, Brazil, South Africa, Indonesia, and others—signed the 'Shanghai Agreement' on site. WAICO, headquartered in Shanghai, is the world's first intergovernmental AI organization, covering AI governance coordination, technical standard mutual recognition, safety framework共建, talent exchange, and capacity building. Xi emphasized that WAICO's establishment marks 'humanity moving from fragmented approaches to shared governance in AI,' and China is willing to share AI development dividends with all nations.
key_points: 习近平宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO），29个创始成员国签署《上海协定》
WAICO是全球首个AI领域的政府间国际组织，总部设在上海
职能涵盖治理规则协调、技术标准互认、安全框架共建
习近平：WAICO标志着人类AI从各自为政走向共同治理
key_points_en: Xi announces WAICO, 29 founding members sign Shanghai Agreement
World's first intergovernmental AI organization, HQ in Shanghai
Covers governance coordination, standards mutual recognition, safety frameworks
Xi: WAICO marks transition from fragmented to shared AI governance

articles.title: 国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》——智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、优质数据供给等8大行动
articles.title_en: NDRC Releases 'AI Cooperative Development Action Plan'—8 Major Actions Including Smart Computing普惠, Open Source Ecosystem, Quality Data Supply
articles.summary: 国家发改委在WAIC 2026上发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》，提出智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、优质数据供给、AI安全治理、国际合作深化等8大行动。计划到2028年建成全球最大的AI算力普惠网络，算力成本降低50%以上，推动AI大模型在千行百业规模化落地。
articles.summary_en: The National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC) released the 'AI Cooperative Development Action Plan' at WAIC 2026, proposing 8 major actions including smart computing普惠, open source ecosystem sharing, quality data supply, AI safety governance, and deepening international cooperation. Target: build the world's largest AI computing普惠 network by 2028, reduce computing costs by over 50%.
articles.content: 国家发改委在WAIC 2026主论坛上正式发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》。8大行动包括：智能算力普惠行动——建设国家AI算力枢纽，到2028年算力成本降低50%以上；开源生态共享行动——建立国家级AI开源社区，培育100个以上开源基础模型；优质数据供给行动——建设AI训练数据开放平台，开放公共数据资源；AI安全治理行动——建立AI安全评估与认证体系；国际合作深化行动——以WAICO为平台推动多边AI治理对话。发改委副主任表示，该计划将与WAICO框架协同推进，形成「国内行动+国际机制」的双轮驱动格局。
articles.content_en: The NDRC officially released the 'AI Cooperative Development Action Plan' at the WAIC 2026 main forum. The 8 major actions include: Smart Computing普惠—build national AI computing hubs, reducing computing costs by over 50% by 2028; Open Source Ecosystem Sharing—establish a national AI open-source community, cultivate 100+ open-source foundation models; Quality Data Supply—build an AI training data open platform, release public data resources; AI Safety Governance—establish AI safety evaluation and certification systems; International Cooperation Deepening—use WAICO as a platform for multilateral AI governance dialogue. The NDRC vice chairman stated the plan will synergize with the WAICO framework.
key_points: 8大行动：智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、优质数据供给、AI安全治理等
目标2028年建成全球最大AI算力普惠网络，算力成本降50%以上
培育100个以上开源基础模型，开放公共数据资源
与WAICO框架协同，形成「国内行动+国际机制」双轮驱动
key_points_en: 8 actions: Smart Computing普惠, Open Source, Data Supply, Safety Governance, etc.
Target 2028: world's largest AI computing普惠 network, 50%+ cost reduction
Cultivate 100+ open-source foundation models, open public data resources
Synergizes with WAICO framework for dual-drive approach

articles.title: Kimi K3 登顶前端代码竞技场：1679分超越Claude Fable 5，100万token上下文窗口，开源模型再创里程碑
articles.title_en: Kimi K3 Tops Frontend Code Arena: 1679 Points Surpasses Claude Fable 5, 1M Token Context, Open-Source Model Hits New Milestone
articles.summary: 月之暗面Kimi K3以1679分登顶前端代码竞技场（Frontend Code Arena），超越Anthropic Claude Fable 5的1652分。Kimi K3采用MoE架构、100万token上下文窗口，在HTML/CSS/JS三端代码生成任务上全面领先。这是继DeepSeek之后，中国开源大模型再次在关键基准上超越国际顶尖闭源模型。
articles.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 tops the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 points, surpassing Anthropic Claude Fable 5's 1652. Kimi K3 features MoE architecture, 1M token context window, leading across HTML/CSS/JS code generation tasks. Following DeepSeek, another Chinese open-source model surpasses top international closed-source models on a key benchmark.
articles.source: Frontend Code Arena / 月之暗面
articles.content: 月之暗面（Moonshot AI）于7月18日发布Kimi K3模型，以1679分登顶前端代码竞技场（Frontend Code Arena），超越此前排名第一的Anthropic Claude Fable 5（1652分）。Kimi K3采用MoE（混合专家）架构，总参数量未公开，但激活参数约850亿，支持100万token上下文窗口。在HTML/CSS/JS三端代码生成任务上，Kimi K3在交互式UI生成、响应式布局、跨浏览器兼容性三项子指标上均取得最高分。Kimi K3以开源方式发布，权重可在HuggingFace下载，采用Apache 2.0许可。
articles.content_en: Moonshot AI released Kimi K3 on July 18, topping the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 points, surpassing the previous leader Anthropic Claude Fable 5 (1652 points). Kimi K3 uses MoE (Mixture of Experts) architecture with approximately 85B activated parameters and supports 1M token context window. Across HTML/CSS/JS code generation tasks, Kimi K3 achieved top scores in interactive UI generation, responsive layout, and cross-browser compatibility. Kimi K3 is open-source with weights available on HuggingFace under Apache 2.0 license.
key_points: Kimi K3 1679分登顶前端代码竞技场，超越Claude Fable 5的1652分
MoE架构，约850亿激活参数，100万token上下文窗口
HTML/CSS/JS三端代码生成全面领先
Apache 2.0开源发布，权重可下载
key_points_en: Kimi K3 scores 1679, tops Frontend Code Arena, surpassing Claude Fable 5's 1652
MoE architecture, ~85B activated params, 1M token context window
Leads across HTML/CSS/JS code generation tasks
Open-source under Apache 2.0, weights available for download

articles.title: 全球AI芯片股暴跌：半导体指数从6月底峰值下跌20%进入熊市，英伟达领跌，纳斯达克100期货跌1.8%
articles.title_en: Global AI Chip Stocks Plunge: Semiconductor Index Falls 20% from Late-June Peak into Bear Market, Nvidia Leads, Nasdaq 100 Futures Down 1.8%
articles.summary: 受Kimi K3发布引发的「算力泡沫担忧」冲击，全球AI芯片股在7月18日大幅下跌。费城半导体指数从6月30日峰值下跌20%，正式进入技术性熊市。英伟达跌幅最大，单日下跌7.2%，AMD跌5.8%，台积电ADR跌4.3%。纳斯达克100期货在盘后交易中下跌1.8%。
articles.summary_en: Global AI chip stocks plunged on July 18, hit by 'computing bubble fears' triggered by Kimi K3's release. The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index fell 20% from its June 30 peak, entering a technical bear market. Nvidia led the decline, falling 7.2% in a single day, AMD down 5.8%, TSMC ADR down 4.3%. Nasdaq 100 futures fell 1.8% in after-hours trading.
articles.content: 全球AI芯片股在7月18日遭遇「黑色星期五」。费城半导体指数当日下跌4.8%，从6月30日的历史峰值累计下跌20%，正式进入技术性熊市。英伟达（NVIDIA）单日下跌7.2%，市值蒸发约2100亿美元，创下2024年9月以来最大单日跌幅。AMD跌5.8%，台积电ADR跌4.3%，博通跌4.1%，高通跌3.6%。市场分析认为，Kimi K3以开源模型实现超越Claude Fable 5的性能，证明「更高效的模型架构可以大幅降低对高端算力的依赖」，动摇了市场对AI算力无限扩张的估值逻辑。
articles.content_en: Global AI chip stocks experienced a 'Black Friday' on July 18. The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index fell 4.8% on the day, accumulating a 20% decline from its June 30 all-time high, entering a technical bear market. Nvidia fell 7.2% in a single day, wiping out approximately $210B in market cap—the largest single-day drop since September 2024. AMD fell 5.8%, TSMC ADR 4.3%, Broadcom 4.1%, Qualcomm 3.6%. Market analysis suggests Kimi K3's open-source model surpassing Claude Fable 5 proves 'more efficient architectures can significantly reduce reliance on high-end computing,' undermining the valuation logic of infinite AI computing expansion.
key_points: 费城半导体指数从6月底峰值下跌20%，进入技术性熊市
英伟达单日跌7.2%，市值蒸发约2100亿美元
Kimi K3引发「算力泡沫担忧」，高效架构降低对高端算力依赖
纳斯达克100期货跌1.8%，科技股恐慌情绪蔓延
key_points_en: Philadelphia Semi Index falls 20% from June peak, enters technical bear market
Nvidia down 7.2% in single day, ~$210B market cap wiped out
Kimi K3 triggers 'computing bubble fears': efficient architecture reduces high-end computing needs
Nasdaq 100 futures down 1.8%, tech panic spreads

articles.title: 高盛警告：「算力扩张时代或已走到尽头」，AI估值逻辑面临重塑，超大规模资本开支预期下调
articles.title_en: Goldman Sachs Warns: 'The Era of Computing Expansion May Have Reached Its End,' AI Valuation Logic Faces Reshaping, CapEx Expectations Downgraded
articles.summary: 高盛在7月18日发布的研报中罕见发出警告，称「算力扩张时代或已走到尽头」。报告指出，Kimi K3等高效开源模型的出现正在改变AI产业的底层逻辑——如果模型效率每季度提升30-50%，那么算力需求增长可能远低于市场预期。高盛将2027年全球AI芯片需求预测下调25%，并建议投资者重新评估超大规模云计算厂商的资本开支计划。
articles.summary_en: Goldman Sachs issued a rare warning in a July 18 research note, stating 'the era of computing expansion may have reached its end.' The report notes that efficient open-source models like Kimi K3 are changing the fundamental logic of the AI industry—if model efficiency improves 30-50% per quarter, computing demand growth may be far below market expectations. Goldman cut 2027 global AI chip demand forecast by 25% and advised investors to reassess hyperscaler CapEx plans.
articles.content: 高盛在Kimi K3发布后的第一时间发布题为「算力扩张时代终结？」的特别研报，引起华尔街广泛关注。报告核心论点是：AI模型的效率提升正在以指数级速度加速，从DeepSeek V4到Kimi K3，中国开源模型在不到一年内实现了两次「性能跃迁」，每一次都大幅降低了对算力的单位消耗。如果这一趋势持续，全球AI芯片需求在2027年可能仅增长40-60%，远低于此前市场预期的100-150%。高盛将2027年全球AI芯片需求预测从4500亿美元下调至3375亿美元，下调幅度25%。同时，高盛建议投资者对微软、亚马逊、谷歌等超大规模云厂商的CapEx计划保持谨慎。
articles.content_en: Goldman Sachs issued a special research note titled 'The End of the Computing Expansion Era?' immediately after Kimi K3's release, drawing widespread attention on Wall Street. The core thesis: AI model efficiency improvements are accelerating exponentially—from DeepSeek V4 to Kimi K3, Chinese open-source models have achieved two 'performance leaps' in under a year, each significantly reducing per-unit computing consumption. If this trend continues, global AI chip demand in 2027 may grow only 40-60%, far below the market's previous expectation of 100-150%. Goldman cut its 2027 global AI chip demand forecast from $450B to $337.5B, a 25% reduction. The bank also advised caution on hyperscaler CapEx plans at Microsoft, Amazon, and Google.
key_points: 高盛罕见警告：算力扩张时代或已走到尽头
模型效率每季度提升30-50%，算力需求增长远低于预期
2027年全球AI芯片需求预测从4500亿下调至3375亿美元（-25%）
建议对超大规模云厂商CapEx计划保持谨慎
key_points_en: Goldman Sachs rare warning: computing expansion era may have ended
Model efficiency improves 30-50% quarterly, computing demand growth far below expectations
2027 global AI chip demand forecast cut from $450B to $337.5B (-25%)
Advises caution on hyperscaler CapEx plans

articles.title: Apple 起诉 OpenAI 窃取AI硬件商业秘密：指控前工程师携机密跳槽，涉及A系列芯片AI引擎设计
articles.title_en: Apple Sues OpenAI for Stealing AI Hardware Trade Secrets: Ex-Engineer Allegedly Took Confidential Info on A-Series Chip AI Engine Design
articles.summary: Apple 7月18日向加州北区联邦法院提起诉讼，指控OpenAI窃取其AI硬件商业秘密。诉状称一名前Apple芯片工程师在2025年跳槽OpenAI时，携带了涉及A系列芯片AI引擎（Neural Engine）的机密设计文档和源代码。Apple要求OpenAI停止使用相关技术并赔偿损失。
articles.summary_en: Apple filed a lawsuit on July 18 in the Northern District of California, accusing OpenAI of stealing its AI hardware trade secrets. The complaint alleges that a former Apple chip engineer, when joining OpenAI in 2025, took confidential design documents and source code related to the A-series chip AI engine (Neural Engine). Apple demands OpenAI cease using the technology and pay damages.
articles.content: Apple于7月18日向美国加州北区联邦法院提起诉讼，指控OpenAI通过挖角Apple芯片工程师窃取其AI硬件商业秘密。诉状详细描述了一名在Apple工作7年的芯片设计工程师，在2025年12月跳槽至OpenAI前，下载了超过500份涉及A系列芯片Neural Engine架构的设计文档、RTL代码和测试用例。Apple声称OpenAI正在其AI加速器芯片「Neural Core」中使用这些被盗技术。Apple要求法院禁止OpenAI使用相关技术、交出所有被盗材料，并赔偿经济损失。OpenAI发言人回应称「指控毫无根据」，将积极应诉。
articles.content_en: Apple filed a lawsuit on July 18 in the US District Court for the Northern District of California, accusing OpenAI of stealing its AI hardware trade secrets through poaching Apple chip engineers. The complaint details that a chip design engineer who worked at Apple for 7 years downloaded over 500 design documents, RTL code, and test cases related to the A-series chip Neural Engine architecture before joining OpenAI in December 2025. Apple claims OpenAI is using the stolen technology in its AI accelerator chip 'Neural Core.' Apple seeks an injunction, return of all materials, and damages. An OpenAI spokesperson called the allegations 'baseless' and vowed to defend vigorously.
key_points: Apple起诉OpenAI窃取AI硬件商业秘密，涉及Neural Engine设计
前工程师跳槽前下载500+份机密文档和源代码
Apple指控OpenAI在「Neural Core」芯片中使用被盗技术
OpenAI回应「指控毫无根据」，将积极应诉
key_points_en: Apple sues OpenAI over AI hardware trade secret theft, involving Neural Engine design
Ex-engineer downloaded 500+ confidential documents before joining OpenAI
Apple alleges OpenAI uses stolen tech in 'Neural Core' chip
OpenAI responds 'allegations baseless,' vows to defend

articles.title: Anthropic 向 Meta 租用算力：两年期合同最高100亿美元，AI竞赛改写云服务格局
articles.title_en: Anthropic Leases Computing from Meta: Up to $10B Two-Year Deal, AI Race Reshapes Cloud Landscape
articles.summary: Anthropic与Meta签署了一项为期两年的算力租赁协议，总额最高可达100亿美元。Anthropic将租用Meta自建的数据中心算力用于训练和推理其下一代AI模型。这笔交易被视为AI公司「多云+多源」算力战略的典型——Anthropic此前主要依赖AWS和GCP，此次引入Meta显示AI巨头正在打破传统云服务格局。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic has signed a two-year computing lease agreement with Meta, worth up to $10 billion. Anthropic will lease Meta's self-built data center computing power for training and inference of its next-generation AI models. The deal is seen as a typical 'multi-cloud + multi-source' computing strategy—Anthropic previously relied mainly on AWS and GCP, and this move signals AI giants breaking traditional cloud patterns.
articles.content: Anthropic与Meta于7月18日宣布签署一项为期两年的算力租赁协议，合同金额最高可达100亿美元。根据协议，Anthropic将租用Meta位于美国、欧洲和亚洲的多个数据中心算力资源，用于训练其下一代旗舰模型（预计2027年发布）以及优化现有Claude系列的推理效率。Anthropic此前主要依赖AWS（亚马逊云）和GCP（谷歌云），此次引入Meta标志着AI公司正在从「单一云依赖」转向「多云+多源」的算力战略。Meta方面，此次租约将帮助其消化过剩算力——Meta正在大规模建设AI数据中心，但自研模型Llama系列的算力需求未能完全填满其扩张中的数据中心。
articles.content_en: Anthropic and Meta announced on July 18 a two-year computing lease agreement worth up to $10 billion. Under the agreement, Anthropic will lease Meta's data center computing resources across the US, Europe, and Asia for training its next-generation flagship model (expected 2027) and optimizing Claude series inference efficiency. Anthropic previously relied mainly on AWS and GCP; this move signals a shift from 'single-cloud dependency' to 'multi-cloud + multi-source' computing strategy. For Meta, the lease helps absorb excess computing capacity—Meta is building AI data centers at scale, but its Llama series' computing needs haven't fully filled its expanding data centers.
key_points: Anthropic与Meta签署两年期算力租赁协议，最高100亿美元
Anthropic从「单一云依赖」（AWS/GCP）转向「多云+多源」战略
Meta通过租约消化其AI数据中心扩张中的过剩算力
AI竞赛正在重塑传统云服务格局
key_points_en: Anthropic-Meta two-year computing lease, up to $10B
Anthropic shifts from single-cloud to multi-cloud+multi-source strategy
Meta absorbs excess capacity from AI data center expansion
AI race is reshaping traditional cloud service landscape

articles.title: 智谱AI年度经常性收入达10亿美元，半年增长15倍，成为中国最快达到10亿美元ARR的AI公司
articles.title_en: Zhipu AI ARR Reaches $1 Billion, 15x Growth in Six Months, Fastest Chinese AI Company to $1B ARR
articles.summary: 智谱AI（Zhipu AI）在7月18日宣布其年度经常性收入（ARR）已达到10亿美元，较2025年底的6500万美元增长15倍，仅用6个月时间。智谱AI由此成为中国最快达到10亿美元ARR的AI公司，超过了字节跳动豆包和月之暗面Kimi。公司表示增长主要来自企业级API调用和模型私有化部署两大业务线。
articles.summary_en: Zhipu AI announced on July 18 that its Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) has reached $1 billion, growing 15x from $65 million at end of 2025 in just 6 months. This makes Zhipu AI the fastest Chinese AI company to reach $1B ARR, surpassing ByteDance Doubao and Moonshot Kimi. The company attributes growth to enterprise API calls and private model deployment.
articles.content: 智谱AI于7月18日披露其年度经常性收入（ARR）已突破10亿美元大关，从2025年底的6500万美元增长至10亿美元，仅用时6个月，增长15倍。智谱AI由此成为中国最快达到10亿美元ARR的AI公司，超越了字节跳动豆包（12个月达到8亿美元ARR）和月之暗面（9个月达到6亿美元ARR）。智谱AI CEO张鹏表示，增长主要来自两大赛道：一是企业级API调用——智谱GLM系列模型已成为中国最大的企业AI API平台，日均调用量超过500亿token；二是模型私有化部署——智谱已为超过200家大型企业（包括银行、保险、制造、能源）部署了私有化AI模型。
articles.content_en: Zhipu AI disclosed on July 18 that its Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) has exceeded $1 billion, growing from $65 million at end of 2025 to $1 billion in just 6 months—a 15x increase. This makes Zhipu AI the fastest Chinese AI company to reach $1B ARR, surpassing ByteDance Doubao (12 months to $800M ARR) and Moonshot Kimi (9 months to $600M ARR). CEO Zhang Peng attributed growth to two tracks: enterprise API calls—Zhipu's GLM series is China's largest enterprise AI API platform with 50B+ daily token calls; and private model deployment—Zhipu has deployed private AI models for 200+ large enterprises across banking, insurance, manufacturing, and energy sectors.
key_points: 智谱AI ARR达10亿美元，半年增长15倍（6500万→10亿）
中国最快达到10亿美元ARR的AI公司
增长来源：企业API日均500亿token + 200+企业私有化部署
超越字节豆包和月之暗面Kimi的增速
key_points_en: Zhipu AI ARR reaches $1B, 15x growth in 6 months ($65M→$1B)
Fastest Chinese AI company to $1B ARR
Growth drivers: 50B+ daily enterprise API tokens + 200+ private deployments
Surpasses ByteDance Doubao and Moonshot Kimi in growth speed

articles.title: Altman承认OpenAI过去12个月表现不佳：「主要是我的错」，承诺2027年重启AGI路线图
articles.title_en: Altman Admits OpenAI Underperformed in Past 12 Months: 'Mostly My Fault,' Pledges to Restart AGI Roadmap in 2027
articles.summary: Sam Altman在7月18日接受The Verge独家采访时罕见承认，OpenAI在过去12个月「表现不佳」，并称「主要是我的错」。Altman坦承公司在产品迭代速度、组织管理和AGI路线图推进方面都存在不足。他承诺2027年将重启AGI路线图，并透露OpenAI正在开发代号为「Orion 2」的下一代基础模型。
articles.summary_en: Sam Altman, in a rare candid interview with The Verge on July 18, admitted that OpenAI has 'underperformed' over the past 12 months, calling it 'mostly my fault.' He acknowledged shortcomings in product iteration speed, organizational management, and AGI roadmap progress. He pledged to restart the AGI roadmap in 2027 and revealed OpenAI is developing a next-generation foundation model codenamed 'Orion 2.'
articles.content: Sam Altman在7月18日接受The Verge独家访问时做出了罕见的自我批评。Altman表示：「过去12个月，我们没有达到自己设定的标准。GPT-5.6的发布比计划晚了3个月，Codex 2.0的集成深度不够，组织管理上我们也犯了很多错误。这些主要是我的错。」Altman承诺2027年将重启OpenAI的AGI路线图，并透露公司正在开发代号为「Orion 2」的下一代基础模型，该模型将在推理能力、多模态融合和Agent自主性方面实现「代际跨越」。Altman还表示，OpenAI正在从「模型优先」转向「产品优先」战略，计划在2027年推出更多可直接面向消费者的AI产品。
articles.content_en: Sam Altman made a rare self-criticism in an exclusive interview with The Verge on July 18. Altman stated: 'Over the past 12 months, we haven't met the standards we set for ourselves. GPT-5.6 launched 3 months late, Codex 2.0's integration depth isn't enough, and we've made many mistakes in organizational management. These are mostly my fault.' Altman pledged to restart OpenAI's AGI roadmap in 2027 and revealed the company is developing a next-generation foundation model codenamed 'Orion 2,' which will achieve 'generational leaps' in reasoning capability, multimodal fusion, and Agent autonomy. He also said OpenAI is shifting from 'model-first' to 'product-first' strategy, planning more direct-to-consumer AI products in 2027.
key_points: Altman罕见承认OpenAI过去12个月表现不佳，称「主要是我的错」
GPT-5.6发布延迟3个月，Codex 2.0集成深度不足
承诺2027年重启AGI路线图，开发代号「Orion 2」的下一代模型
OpenAI将从「模型优先」转向「产品优先」战略
key_points_en: Altman admits OpenAI underperformed past 12 months, 'mostly my fault'
GPT-5.6 delayed 3 months, Codex 2.0 integration insufficient
Pledges to restart AGI roadmap in 2027, developing 'Orion 2'
OpenAI shifting from 'model-first' to 'product-first' strategy

articles.title: 中兴Matrix超节点获WAIC 2026 SAIL之星奖：7nm存算一体架构，大模型推理能效比提升8倍
articles.title_en: ZTE Matrix Supernode Wins WAIC 2026 SAIL Star Award: 7nm Compute-in-Memory Architecture, 8x Energy Efficiency Improvement for LLM Inference
articles.summary: 中兴通讯Matrix超节点在WAIC 2026上荣获SAIL之星奖（Super AI Leader）。Matrix采用7nm存算一体架构，专为大模型推理场景设计，在标准测试中实现能效比提升8倍、延迟降低60%。Matrix超节点已在中国移动、百度的AI推理场景中投入商用部署。
articles.summary_en: ZTE's Matrix Supernode won the WAIC 2026 SAIL Star Award (Super AI Leader). Matrix uses a 7nm compute-in-memory architecture, specifically designed for LLM inference, achieving 8x energy efficiency improvement and 60% latency reduction in standard benchmarks. Matrix has been commercially deployed in AI inference scenarios at China Mobile and Baidu.
articles.content: 中兴通讯Matrix超节点在WAIC 2026上荣获SAIL之星奖（Super AI Leader），这是WAIC最高奖项之一。Matrix超节点采用7nm制程存算一体架构，专为大模型推理场景优化。在MLPerf Inference v5.0标准测试中，Matrix在LLM推理场景下实现能效比8倍提升（vs传统GPU方案）、p99延迟降低60%、单节点支持1000+并发推理。Matrix超节点已在中国移动的智能客服系统和百度搜索的AI摘要场景中投入商用部署。中兴通讯在WAIC现场展示了Matrix在真实场景中的运行效果——一台Matrix超节点可以同时支持1000路AI对话，功耗仅为传统GPU方案的1/8。
articles.content_en: ZTE's Matrix Supernode won the WAIC 2026 SAIL Star Award (Super AI Leader), one of WAIC's highest honors. Matrix uses a 7nm compute-in-memory architecture, optimized for LLM inference scenarios. In MLPerf Inference v5.0 standard benchmarks, Matrix achieved 8x energy efficiency improvement (vs traditional GPU solutions), 60% p99 latency reduction, and 1,000+ concurrent inference support per node. Matrix has been commercially deployed at China Mobile's intelligent customer service system and Baidu Search's AI summary scenarios. ZTE demonstrated Matrix in real-world scenarios at WAIC—one Matrix node can simultaneously support 1,000 AI conversations at 1/8 the power consumption of traditional GPU solutions.
key_points: 中兴Matrix获WAIC 2026 SAIL之星奖，最高奖项之一
7nm存算一体架构，专为大模型推理优化
MLPerf测试：能效比提升8倍，延迟降低60%，单节点1000+并发
已在中国移动、百度场景中商用部署
key_points_en: ZTE Matrix wins WAIC 2026 SAIL Star Award, one of highest honors
7nm compute-in-memory architecture, optimized for LLM inference
MLPerf: 8x energy efficiency, 60% latency reduction, 1,000+ concurrent per node
Commercially deployed at China Mobile and Baidu

hero.title: Kimi K3 登顶全球代码竞技场引发AI芯片股暴跌——从「DeepSeek时刻」到「Kimi冲击」，开源模型如何撼动算力泡沫
hero.title_en: Kimi K3 Tops Global Code Arena, Triggers AI Chip Stock Rout—From 'DeepSeek Moment' to 'Kimi Shock,' How Open-Source Models Are Puncturing the Computing Bubble
hero.summary: 月之暗面Kimi K3以1679分登顶前端代码竞技场，超越Claude Fable 5，引发全球AI芯片股暴跌。费城半导体指数跌入技术性熊市，英伟达单日跌7.2%。高盛警告「算力扩张时代或已走到尽头」。同日，WAIC 2026迎来高潮——习近平宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO），29个创始成员国签署协定，中国AI从「技术追赶」走向「规则制定」。
hero.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 tops Frontend Code Arena with 1679 points, surpassing Claude Fable 5, triggering a global AI chip stock rout. Philadelphia Semi Index enters bear market, Nvidia down 7.2%. Goldman Sachs warns 'computing expansion era may have ended.' Meanwhile, WAIC 2026 reaches its climax—Xi Jinping announces WAICO with 29 founding members, marking China's AI shift from 'tech catching up' to 'rule setting.'

articles.title: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro 确认延期：编程能力为主要卡点，6 月底更新训练数据后测试仍未达标，内部评估称「至少还需数月」
articles.title_en: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro Confirmed Delayed: Coding Capabilities the Main Bottleneck, Updated Training Data in Late June Still Failed Benchmarks, Internal Assessment Says 'At Least Several Months'
articles.summary: The Information 7 月 17 日独家报道，Google 原定 6 月推出的 Gemini 3.5 Pro 旗舰模型因编程能力未达内部目标而推迟，6 月底更新训练数据后测试结果仍然不达标，内部评估称至少还需要数月才能达到发布标准。这是 Google 自 Gemini 系列推出以来面临的最严重产品延迟。
articles.summary_en: The Information exclusively reported on July 17 that Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro flagship model, originally scheduled for June, has been delayed due to coding capabilities failing to meet internal targets. Even after updated training data in late June, benchmark results still fell short. Internal assessment says at least several more months are needed. This is Google's most serious product delay since the Gemini series launched.
articles.content: The Information 7 月 17 日独家报道，Google 原定于 2026 年 6 月推出的 Gemini 3.5 Pro 旗舰模型因编程能力未达内部目标而推迟。据知情人士透露，Google 在 5 月的 I/O 大会上高调宣布 Gemini 3.5 Pro，当时内部时间表已经非常紧张。6 月中旬，团队对模型进行了最后一次大规模训练数据更新，但 SWE-Bench Verified 和 Codeforces 等编程基准测试的结果仍然低于内部设定的「发布门槛」。更严重的是，部分测试结果甚至低于 2025 年底发布的 Gemini 3.0 Ultra。Alphabet 股价 7 月 16 日下跌 4.4%，市值蒸发约 850 亿美元，分析师普遍认为这与 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的延期消息直接相关。
articles.content_en: The Information exclusively reported on July 17 that Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro flagship model, originally scheduled for June 2026, has been delayed due to coding capabilities failing to meet internal targets. According to sources, Google's high-profile announcement at I/O in May was already on an aggressive timeline. In mid-June, the team conducted a final large-scale training data update, but results on SWE-Bench Verified and Codeforces coding benchmarks still fell below the internal 'release threshold.' Worse, some results were below those of Gemini 3.0 Ultra released in late 2025. Alphabet stock dropped 4.4% on July 16, wiping out approximately $85B in market cap, widely attributed to the Gemini 3.5 Pro delay.
key_points: Gemini 3.5 Pro 原定 6 月推出，因编程能力未达标而推迟
6 月底更新训练数据后测试结果仍不达标，内部评估需数月
Alphabet 股价 7/16 下跌 4.4%，市值蒸发约 850 亿美元
部分测试结果低于 2025 年底的 Gemini 3.0 Ultra
key_points_en: Gemini 3.5 Pro originally scheduled for June, delayed over coding capabilities
Updated training data in late June still failed benchmarks; months needed
Alphabet stock dropped 4.4% on July 16, ~$85B market cap wiped out
Some results below Gemini 3.0 Ultra from late 2025

articles.title: WAIC 2026 在上海正式开幕：习近平出席开幕式并发表主旨演讲，1100+ 企业参展、300+ 全球首发
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 Officially Opens in Shanghai: President Xi Attends Opening Ceremony with Keynote, 1,100+ Exhibitors, 300+ Global Debuts
articles.summary: WAIC 2026（世界人工智能大会）7 月 17 日在上海世博中心正式开幕。国家主席习近平出席开幕式并发表主旨演讲——这是习近平首次在 WAIC 发表主旨演讲，强调 AI 发展要「以人民为中心、以安全为底线、以合作为路径」。1100+ 家企业参展（海外 210 家）、300+ 全球首发产品、10 万平方米展区，9 位图灵奖/诺奖得主到场。
articles.summary_en: WAIC 2026 officially opened on July 17 at the Shanghai World Expo Center. President Xi Jinping attended and delivered a keynote—his first-ever WAIC keynote, stressing AI development must be 'people-centered, safety-grounded, and cooperation-oriented.' 1,100+ exhibitors (210 overseas), 300+ global debuts, 100,000 sqm exhibition space, 9 Turing/Nobel laureates in attendance.
articles.source: 新华社 / WAIC 2026 组委会
articles.content: 7 月 17 日上午 9:00，WAIC 2026 在上海世博中心正式开幕。国家主席习近平出席开幕式并发表主旨演讲——这是习近平自 2018 年首届 WAIC 以来首次亲临现场发表主旨演讲。习近平在演讲中强调「人工智能是引领这一轮科技革命和产业变革的战略性技术」，中国 AI 发展要「以人民为中心、以安全为底线、以合作为路径」，反对「任何形式的脱钩断链和技术封锁」。演讲结束后，习近平参观了华为、努比亚等展台。
articles.content_en: WAIC 2026 officially opened at 9:00 AM on July 17 at the Shanghai World Expo Center. President Xi Jinping attended the opening ceremony and delivered a keynote—his first in-person keynote at WAIC since 2018. Xi emphasized that 'AI is the strategic technology leading this round of technological revolution and industrial transformation,' and that China's AI development must be 'people-centered, safety-grounded, and cooperation-oriented,' opposing 'any form of decoupling and technology blockade.' After the speech, Xi toured the Huawei and Nubia exhibition booths.
key_points: 习近平首次在 WAIC 发表主旨演讲，WAIC 升级为国家级战略信号
核心立场：以人民为中心、以安全为底线、以合作为路径
1100+ 家企业参展，300+ 全球首发，9 位图灵/诺奖得主到场
习近平参观华为 Atlas 950、努比亚 AI 手机等展台
key_points_en: Xi's first-ever WAIC keynote; WAIC elevated to national strategic signal
Core stance: people-centered, safety-grounded, cooperation-oriented
1,100+ exhibitors, 300+ global debuts, 9 Turing/Nobel laureates
Xi toured Huawei Atlas 950 and Nubia AI phone booths

articles.title: 华为 Atlas 950 超节点 WAIC 真机首展：4096 卡昇腾 1000、FP8 3.2 EFLOPS、现场演示 3.2 天训完 DeepSeek V4
articles.title_en: Huawei Atlas 950 Supernode Makes Physical Debut at WAIC: 4,096 Ascend 1000 Cards, 3.2 EFLOPS FP8, Live Demo Training DeepSeek V4 in 3.2 Days
articles.summary: 华为在 WAIC 2026 展台首次公开展出 Atlas 950 超节点真机——4U 液冷机箱集成 4096 张昇腾 1000 芯片、FP8 总算力 3.2 EFLOPS、支持 1 万亿参数模型训练。展台现场演示了基于 Atlas 950 的 DeepSeek V4 训练——243 亿 Token 数据、3.2 天完成，展会期间观众可看到「训练完成」的实时画面。
articles.summary_en: Huawei publicly displayed the Atlas 950 supernode for the first time at WAIC 2026—4U liquid-cooled chassis with 4,096 Ascend 1000 chips, 3.2 EFLOPS FP8, supporting 1-trillion-parameter model training. A live demo showed DeepSeek V4 training on 24.3B tokens completing in 3.2 days, visible to visitors throughout the exhibition.
articles.content: 华为展台是 WAIC 2026 人气最高的展区之一，Atlas 950 超节点真机是全场最受关注的单品。Atlas 950 最早于 2025 年 9 月华为全联接大会上发布，但此前一直以「渲染图+参数表」的方式存在，这是第一次公众可以看到实物。展台左侧的 85 寸交互屏上运行着实时演示——从 HuggingFace 导入 DeepSeek V4 权重，在 Atlas 950 上启动训练，到展会开幕时已经运行了 2.5 天，显示「3.2 天完成」。华为还展示了训推一体方案——训练完成后无需重启即可切换推理模式。
articles.content_en: The Huawei booth was one of the most popular at WAIC 2026, with the Atlas 950 supernode as the most-attended single exhibit. First announced at Huawei Connect in September 2025, the Atlas 950 previously existed only as 'renderings + spec sheets.' An 85-inch interactive screen ran a live demo: importing DeepSeek V4 weights from HuggingFace, starting training on Atlas 950, with '3.2 days to completion' indicated. By the time the expo opened, the demo had been running for 2.5 days. Huawei also showcased train-inference integration—the same cluster can switch to inference mode without restart.
key_points: Atlas 950 首次真机展示，4U 液冷机箱集成 4096 张昇腾 1000
FP8 3.2 EFLOPS、HCCS 2.4Tbps/卡、支持 1 万亿参数训练
现场演示：3.2 天训完 DeepSeek V4，展会期间可看实时进度
训推一体：训练完成后无需重启切换推理
key_points_en: Atlas 950 physical debut, 4096 Ascend 1000 cards in 4U liquid-cooled chassis
3.2 EFLOPS FP8, 2.4Tbps HCCS per card, supports 1-trillion-parameter training
Live demo: DeepSeek V4 trained in 3.2 days, real-time progress visible
Train-inference integrated: no restart needed to switch modes

articles.title: 全球首款 AI 智能体手机「努比亚豆包」WAIC 亮相：无 App 交互、内置 Doubao Agent 3.0、4999 元起
articles.title_en: World's First AI-Agent Smartphone 'Nubia Doubao' Debuts at WAIC: No-App Interaction, Doubao Agent 3.0 Built-in, Starting at ¥4,999
articles.summary: 努比亚与字节跳动联名推出的全球首款 AI 智能体手机——努比亚豆包——在 WAIC 2026 首次公开亮相。手机采用「无 App 交互」设计，长按侧边 AI 键唤醒 Agent，直接通过语音/文字完成跨应用操作。搭载骁龙 9 Gen 4 AI 版、12GB+256GB 起、4999 元起售。7 月 20 日开启预售。
articles.summary_en: The world's first AI-agent smartphone—the Nubia Doubao, co-branded by Nubia and ByteDance—made its public debut at WAIC 2026. The phone features a 'no-App interaction' design—long-press the side AI key to wake the Agent for cross-app operations via voice/text. Powered by Snapdragon 9 Gen 4 AI Edition, 12GB+256GB starting at ¥4,999. Pre-sales begin July 20.
articles.source: 努比亚 / 字节跳动豆包
articles.content: 努比亚展台在 WAIC 2026 第一天几乎被围得水泄不通。努比亚豆包（Nubia Doubao）由努比亚与字节跳动豆包团队联合研发，搭载 DeepSeek V4 Flash 端侧推理 + Doubao Agent 3.0 云端协同双引擎。核心设计理念——「无 App 交互」：手机没有传统的应用抽屉，桌面只有一个 Agent 界面。现场演示中，Agent 在 12 秒内完成了携程查票、滴滴叫车、美团订座三步操作。售价：12+256GB ¥4999、16+512GB ¥5999。
articles.content_en: The Nubia booth was nearly mobbed on WAIC 2026's first day. The Nubia Doubao, co-developed by Nubia and ByteDance's Doubao team, features a dual-engine architecture: on-device DeepSeek V4 Flash inference + cloud-based Doubao Agent 3.0. Core design philosophy: 'no-App interaction'—the phone has no traditional app drawer, only a single Agent interface. A live demo showed the Agent completing Ctrip ticketing, DiDi ride-hailing, and Meituan table reservation in 12 seconds. Pricing: ¥4,999 (12+256GB), ¥5,999 (16+512GB).
key_points: 全球首款 AI 智能体手机，努比亚与字节豆包联合研发
「无 App 交互」设计：长按 AI 键唤醒 Agent 跨应用操作
骁龙 9 Gen 4 AI 版 + DeepSeek V4 Flash 端侧推理
售价 ¥4999 起，7 月 20 日预售
key_points_en: World's first AI-agent smartphone, co-developed by Nubia and ByteDance Doubao
'No-App Interaction' design: long-press AI key for cross-app operations
Snapdragon 9 Gen 4 AI Edition + on-device DeepSeek V4 Flash
Starting at ¥4,999; pre-sales July 20

articles.title: 阶跃星辰 Step AOS 智能体操作系统 WAIC 开源发布：Apache 2.0、已接入 120+ 第三方应用
articles.title_en: Stepfun's Step AOS Agent OS Open-Sourced at WAIC: Apache 2.0, 120+ Third-Party Apps Integrated
articles.summary: 阶跃星辰在 WAIC 2026 上发布 Step AOS（Agent Operating System）——面向智能体开发与运行的开源操作系统，提供 Agent 全生命周期管理、多 Agent 协作引擎、记忆与工具管理系统、安全沙箱。已接入 120+ 第三方应用，支持 10 万级并发 Agent 实例，以 Apache 2.0 协议开源。
articles.summary_en: Stepfun released Step AOS (Agent Operating System) at WAIC 2026—an open-source operating system for agent development and operation, providing full agent lifecycle management, multi-agent collaboration engine, memory and tool management system, and security sandbox. Integrated with 120+ third-party apps, supporting 100K+ concurrent agent instances, open-sourced under Apache 2.0.
articles.content: 阶跃星辰在 WAIC 2026 主论坛上发布 Step AOS。架构分为四层——Agent 运行时层（支持 10 万级并发，单实例 50MB）、多 Agent 协作引擎（DAG 与 Graph 两种模式，延迟 <10ms）、记忆与工具管理层（向量+图数据库双存储）、安全沙箱（gVisor 容器隔离）。Step AOS 将以 Apache 2.0 开源，GitHub 仓库已创建。同步发布 Step AOS 应用商店，首批 50 个 Agent 模板。
articles.content_en: Stepfun released Step AOS at the WAIC 2026 main forum. The architecture has four layers: Agent Runtime (100K+ concurrent instances, 50MB per instance), Multi-Agent Collaboration Engine (DAG and Graph modes, <10ms latency), Memory and Tool Management (vector + graph DB dual storage), and Security Sandbox (gVisor container isolation). Step AOS will be open-sourced under Apache 2.0 with the GitHub repo already created. The Step AOS App Store launched with 50 initial agent templates.
key_points: Step AOS 四层架构：运行时 + 协作 + 记忆/工具 + 安全沙箱
支持 10 万级并发 Agent 实例，单实例 50MB 内存
已接入 120+ 第三方应用，Apache 2.0 开源
同步发布 Step AOS 应用商店，首批 50 个 Agent 模板
key_points_en: Step AOS four-layer architecture: Runtime + Collaboration + Memory/Tool + Security
100K+ concurrent agent instances, 50MB per instance
120+ third-party apps integrated; open-sourced under Apache 2.0
Step AOS App Store launched with 50 initial agent templates

articles.title: Alphabet 股价 7/16 暴跌 4.4%，Gemini 3.5 Pro 延期引发市场对 Google AI 竞争力的广泛质疑
articles.title_en: Alphabet Stock Plunges 4.4% on July 16 as Gemini 3.5 Pro Delay Sparks Broad Questions About Google AI Competitiveness
articles.summary: Alphabet 股价 7 月 16 日收盘下跌 4.4%，市值蒸发约 850 亿美元，创下自 2024 年初以来最大单日跌幅。分析师普遍认为 Gemini 3.5 Pro 延期是导火索，但更深层的原因是市场对 Google AI 战略整体竞争力的担忧——从 AI 编程工具到旗舰模型，Google 在多个关键领域正在被 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 拉开差距。
articles.summary_en: Alphabet stock closed down 4.4% on July 16, wiping out approximately $85B in market cap—the largest single-day drop since early 2024. Analysts widely attribute the trigger to the Gemini 3.5 Pro delay, but the deeper concern is about Google's overall AI strategy competitiveness—from AI coding tools to flagship models, Google is falling behind OpenAI and Anthropic in multiple key areas.
articles.content: Alphabet 股价 7 月 16 日收盘下跌 4.4% 至 162.37 美元，市值蒸发约 850 亿美元。这是自 2024 年初以来 Alphabet 最大单日跌幅。市场分析指出，Gemini 3.5 Pro 延期不仅是一个单一产品的推迟，更暴露了 Google 在 AI 领域更深层的结构性问题——多个部门各自为战、内部派系斗争、AI 编程工具重复建设。摩根士丹利分析师将 Alphabet 评级从「增持」下调至「中性」，目标价从 195 美元下调至 175 美元。
articles.content_en: Alphabet stock closed at $162.37 on July 16, down 4.4% and wiping out approximately $85B in market cap—the largest single-day drop since early 2024. Market analysis indicates the Gemini 3.5 Pro delay is not just a single product postponement but exposes deeper structural issues within Google AI—multiple departments operating in silos, internal factional struggles, and redundant AI coding tool development. Morgan Stanley analysts downgraded Alphabet from 'Overweight' to 'Equal-weight,' cutting the target price from $195 to $175.
key_points: Alphabet 股价 7/16 下跌 4.4%，市值蒸发约 850 亿美元
2024 年初以来最大单日跌幅
摩根士丹利下调评级，目标价从 195 降至 175 美元
市场担忧 Google AI 战略整体竞争力而非单一产品
key_points_en: Alphabet stock down 4.4% on July 16, ~$85B market cap wiped out
Largest single-day drop since early 2024
Morgan Stanley downgraded; target price cut from $195 to $175
Market concerns over Google AI overall strategy, not just single product

articles.title: 谷歌内部 AI 编程工具各自为战：云/DeepMind/Android 三线并行，重复建设严重，联合创始人布林主张加速引发安全派反弹
articles.title_en: Google's Internal AI Coding Tools War: Cloud/DeepMind/Android Three Parallel Lines, Severe Redundancy, Co-founder Brin's Acceleration Push Triggers Safety Backlash
articles.summary: The Information 深度报道揭示 Google 内部 AI 编程工具乱象——谷歌云、DeepMind、Android 三大部门各自开发 AI 编程工具，互不兼容。75% 的新代码由 AI 生成，但重要代码必须人类编写。联合创始人谢尔盖·布林主张加速推进 AI 编程，但安全团队坚持关键代码必须人工审查，内部矛盾在 Gemini 3.5 Pro 延期后进一步激化。
articles.summary_en: The Information's deep dive reveals Google's internal AI coding tool chaos—Google Cloud, DeepMind, and Android each developing their own AI coding tools, incompatible with each other. 75% of new code is AI-generated but critical code must be human-written. Co-founder Sergey Brin pushes for acceleration while safety teams insist on human review for critical code, with internal conflicts escalating after the Gemini 3.5 Pro delay.
articles.content: The Information 7 月 17 日的深度报道揭开了 Google 内部 AI 编程工具的神秘面纱。谷歌云团队开发了基于 Gemini 3.0 的编程助手 Cloud Code Assist，DeepMind 团队打造了 AlphaCode 2，Android 团队则有自己的 Android Studio AI 插件——三个工具互不兼容、使用不同的底层模型、甚至有独立的收费体系。更令人震惊的是，Google 内部 75% 的新代码由 AI 生成，但一项内部政策要求「任何涉及核心算法的代码必须由人类工程师逐行审查」。联合创始人谢尔盖·布林在 6 月的内部会议上主张「大幅放宽 AI 代码审查门槛」，遭到安全团队和部分工程高管的强烈反对。布林甚至直言「如果我们继续这样，OpenAI 的 Codex 会吃掉我们」。
articles.content_en: The Information's July 17 deep dive reveals Google's internal AI coding tool chaos. Google Cloud's team built Cloud Code Assist based on Gemini 3.0, DeepMind created AlphaCode 2, and Android has its own Android Studio AI plugin—three tools incompatible with each other, using different underlying models, with independent pricing systems. Even more shocking: 75% of Google's new code is AI-generated, but an internal policy requires 'any code involving core algorithms to be reviewed line-by-line by human engineers.' Co-founder Sergey Brin pushed at a June internal meeting to 'significantly relax the AI code review threshold,' facing strong opposition from safety teams and senior engineering executives. Brin reportedly said, 'If we continue like this, OpenAI's Codex will eat us alive.'
key_points: 谷歌云/DeepMind/Android 三线各自开发 AI 编程工具，互不兼容
75% 新代码由 AI 生成，但核心算法代码必须人类逐行审查
布林主张放宽限制，安全团队强烈反对，内部矛盾激化
Gemini 3.5 Pro 延期成为内部矛盾的集中爆发点
key_points_en: Google Cloud/DeepMind/Android each developing incompatible AI coding tools
75% of new code AI-generated, but core algorithm code requires human review
Brin pushes for relaxed rules, safety teams strongly oppose, conflict escalates
Gemini 3.5 Pro delay becomes the flashpoint for internal conflicts

articles.title: 前 OpenAI CTO Mira Murati 创办 Thinking Machines Lab 发布 Inkling 模型：9750 亿参数 MoE、Apache 2.0 开放权重、美国开放权重模型第一
articles.title_en: Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab Releases Inkling: 975B MoE, Apache 2.0 Open Weights, #1 US Open-Weight Model
articles.summary: 前 OpenAI CTO Mira Murati 于 2025 年 2 月创办的 Thinking Machines Lab 在 7 月 15 日发布首个开放权重模型 Inkling——9750 亿参数 MoE 架构（410 亿激活参数）、1M 上下文窗口、Apache 2.0 许可。Artificial Analysis 综合评分 41，美国开放权重模型第一。公司 7 月获 20 亿美元融资（a16z/Nvidia/Accel 领投），估值 120 亿美元。
articles.summary_en: Thinking Machines Lab, founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati in February 2025, released its first open-weight model Inkling on July 15—975B parameter MoE (41B activated parameters), 1M context window, Apache 2.0 license. Artificial Analysis composite score of 41, #1 US open-weight model. The company raised $2B in July (led by a16z/Nvidia/Accel) at a $12B valuation.
articles.content: 前 OpenAI CTO Mira Murati 于 2025 年 2 月创办的 Thinking Machines Lab 在 7 月 15 日正式发布首个模型 Inkling。Inkling 采用 9750 亿参数 MoE 架构（每次推理激活 410 亿参数），上下文窗口 100 万 token，以 Apache 2.0 协议开放权重。模型借鉴 DeepSeek-V3 架构，使用 Kimi K2.5 数据优化，从零训练耗时 9 个月。Artificial Analysis 综合评分 41，在所有美国开放权重模型中排名第一。7 月公司完成 20 亿美元融资，a16z、Nvidia、Accel 联合领投，估值 120 亿美元。联合创始人翁荔（前 OpenAI 安全 VP）负责安全与对齐。
articles.content_en: Thinking Machines Lab, founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati in February 2025, officially released its first model Inkling on July 15. Inkling features a 975B-parameter MoE architecture (41B activated parameters per inference), 1M-token context window, and Apache 2.0 open weights. The model draws on DeepSeek-V3 architecture, optimized with Kimi K2.5 data, trained from scratch in 9 months. Artificial Analysis composite score of 41, ranking #1 among all US open-weight models. The company raised $2B in July led by a16z, Nvidia, and Accel at a $12B valuation. Co-founder Weng Li (former OpenAI Safety VP) leads safety and alignment.
key_points: Inkling：9750 亿参数 MoE、410 亿激活、1M 上下文、Apache 2.0
9 个月从零训练，借鉴 DeepSeek-V3 架构 + Kimi K2.5 数据优化
Artificial Analysis 综合评分 41，美国开放权重模型第一
7 月完成 20 亿美元融资，估值 120 亿美元
key_points_en: Inkling: 975B MoE, 41B activated, 1M context, Apache 2.0
9 months from scratch training, DeepSeek-V3 architecture + Kimi K2.5 data
Artificial Analysis composite score 41, #1 US open-weight model
$2B raised in July at $12B valuation

articles.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash 已上线但客户评价两极分化：Figma 好评、Platzi 转向 Anthropic——Google 面临「中端强旗舰弱」的尴尬局面
articles.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Flash Goes Live but Customer Reviews Polarized: Figma Praises, Platzi Migrates to Anthropic—Google Faces 'Strong Mid-Tier, Weak Flagship' Dilemma
articles.summary: 谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Flash 已在 6 月底上线，但客户反馈呈现明显的两极分化。Figma 团队表示 Flash 版本在 UI 生成任务上表现优异，称「比 GPT-5.6 mini 更高效」。但在线教育平台 Platzi 却宣布将主力推理引擎从 Gemini 3.5 Flash 切换到 Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8，原因是「在复杂编程任务上的准确率不够稳定」。Google 正面临「中端模型强、旗舰模型弱」的尴尬局面。
articles.summary_en: Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash went live in late June, but customer feedback is sharply polarized. Figma's team praised the Flash version for UI generation tasks, calling it 'more efficient than GPT-5.6 mini.' However, online education platform Platzi announced it would switch its main inference engine from Gemini 3.5 Flash to Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8, citing 'unstable accuracy on complex programming tasks.' Google faces an awkward 'strong mid-tier, weak flagship' situation.
articles.content: Gemini 3.5 Flash 于 6 月底上线后，市场反馈呈现出鲜明的两极分化。Figma 的 AI 工程副总裁在 X 上发文称「Gemini 3.5 Flash 在 UI 代码生成方面比 GPT-5.6 mini 更高效，尤其是在 Figma-to-Code 任务中，生成代码的可编辑性明显更好」。但 Platzi 却在 7 月 15 日的博客中宣布将主力推理引擎从 Gemini 3.5 Flash 切换到 Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8，原因是「在涉及多步推理的复杂编程任务上，Gemini 3.5 Flash 的准确率不够稳定，尤其是在代码审查和调试场景中」。这种两极分化的反馈让 Google 面临一个尴尬的局面——中小模型表现出色，但旗舰模型无法如期交付。
articles.content_en: Since Gemini 3.5 Flash launched in late June, market feedback has been sharply polarized. Figma's VP of AI Engineering posted on X: 'Gemini 3.5 Flash is more efficient than GPT-5.6 mini for UI code generation, especially in Figma-to-Code tasks where the generated code is significantly more editable.' However, Platzi announced in a July 15 blog post that it would switch its main inference engine from Gemini 3.5 Flash to Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8, citing 'unstable accuracy on complex programming tasks involving multi-step reasoning, especially in code review and debugging scenarios.' This polarized feedback leaves Google facing an awkward situation—strong mid-tier models but an inability to deliver a flagship.
key_points: Gemini 3.5 Flash 6 月底上线，客户反馈两极分化
Figma 好评：UI 代码生成比 GPT-5.6 mini 更高效
Platzi 转向 Anthropic：复杂编程任务准确率不够稳定
Google 面临「中端强旗舰弱」的尴尬局面
key_points_en: Gemini 3.5 Flash launched late June, sharply polarized feedback
Figma praises: more efficient than GPT-5.6 mini for UI code generation
Platzi migrates to Anthropic: unstable accuracy on complex coding tasks
Google faces 'strong mid-tier, weak flagship' dilemma

articles.title: OpenAI Codex 与 Meta Code Llama 在 AI 编程领域加速，与 Google 的差距在 SWE-Bench 上持续扩大
articles.title_en: OpenAI Codex and Meta Code Llama Accelerate in AI Coding, Gap with Google Widens on SWE-Bench
articles.summary: SWE-Bench Verified 最新排行榜显示，OpenAI Codex 2.0 以 76.3% 的通过率位居第一，Meta Code Llama 5 以 72.1% 位居第二，而 Google 最强的编程模型 Gemini 3.0 Ultra 仅以 58.4% 排名第五，落后于 Anthropic Claude 4.0 和 DeepSeek R3。在 Gemini 3.5 Pro 延期的情况下，Google 在 AI 编程领域的差距正在加速扩大。
articles.summary_en: The latest SWE-Bench Verified leaderboard shows OpenAI Codex 2.0 ranking first with 76.3% pass rate, Meta Code Llama 5 second at 72.1%, while Google's strongest coding model Gemini 3.0 Ultra ranks only fifth at 58.4%, behind Anthropic Claude 4.0 and DeepSeek R3. With Gemini 3.5 Pro delayed, Google's gap in AI coding is accelerating.
articles.content: SWE-Bench Verified 最新排行榜于 7 月 16 日更新，数据显示 OpenAI 与 Meta 在 AI 编程领域的领先优势正在持续扩大。OpenAI Codex 2.0 以 76.3% 的通过率稳居榜首，该模型是 OpenAI 专门针对编程任务优化的旗舰模型，深度集成在 Cursor 和 Windsurf 等 Agent 工具中。Meta Code Llama 5 以 72.1% 排名第二，得益于 Meta 在代码数据集的持续投入。相比之下，Google 最强的编程模型 Gemini 3.0 Ultra 仅以 58.4% 排名第五，甚至落后于 Anthropic Claude 4.0（67.8%）和 DeepSeek R3（63.2%）。分析师指出，如果 Gemini 3.5 Pro 不能在 2026 年底之前交付并显著提升编程能力，Google 在 AI 编程这个关键赛道上可能面临结构性落后。
articles.content_en: The latest SWE-Bench Verified leaderboard, updated on July 16, shows OpenAI and Meta's lead in AI coding continuing to widen. OpenAI Codex 2.0 leads with 76.3% pass rate, optimized specifically for coding tasks and deeply integrated into Agent tools like Cursor and Windsurf. Meta Code Llama 5 ranks second at 72.1%, benefiting from Meta's sustained investment in code datasets. By contrast, Google's strongest coding model, Gemini 3.0 Ultra, ranks only fifth at 58.4%, trailing even Anthropic Claude 4.0 (67.8%) and DeepSeek R3 (63.2%). Analysts note that if Gemini 3.5 Pro cannot deliver by end of 2026 with significant coding capability improvements, Google may face a structural disadvantage in the critical AI coding赛道.
key_points: SWE-Bench 最新排行：OpenAI Codex 2.0 76.3% 第一、Meta Code Llama 5 72.1% 第二
Google Gemini 3.0 Ultra 仅 58.4% 排名第五，落后 Anthropic 和 DeepSeek
Gemini 3.5 Pro 延期将进一步扩大 Google 在 AI 编程领域的差距
分析师警告：若年底前无法交付，Google 可能面临结构性落后
key_points_en: SWE-Bench latest: OpenAI Codex 2.0 76.3% #1, Meta Code Llama 5 72.1% #2
Google Gemini 3.0 Ultra only 58.4% #5, behind Anthropic and DeepSeek
Gemini 3.5 Pro delay will further widen Google's AI coding gap
Analysts warn: if unable to deliver by year-end, Google may face structural disadvantage

hero.title: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro 延期——编程能力未达目标，旗舰模型推迟数月，内部派系斗争浮出水面，AI 编程格局加速洗牌
hero.title_en: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro Delayed—Coding Capabilities Miss Target, Flagship Model Slips Months, Internal Factional Struggles Surface, AI Coding Landscape Shifts
hero.summary: Google 原定 6 月推出的 Gemini 3.5 Pro 旗舰模型因编程能力未达内部目标而推迟数月。6 月底更新训练数据后测试结果仍然不达标，Alphabet 股价 7/16 下跌 4.4%。更严重的是内部问题——谷歌云、DeepMind、Android 各自开发 AI 编程工具，75% 新代码由 AI 生成但重要代码必须人类编写，派系斗争让 Gemini 3.5 Pro 成为最大牺牲品。OpenAI 与 Meta 在 AI 编程领域加速拉开差距。
hero.summary_en: Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro flagship model, originally scheduled for June, has been delayed for months as coding capabilities fail to meet internal targets. Updated training data in late June still fell short. Alphabet stock dropped 4.4% on July 16. More critically, internal struggles—Google Cloud, DeepMind, and Android each developing their own AI coding tools, 75% of new code AI-generated but critical code must be human-written—have made Gemini 3.5 Pro the biggest casualty. OpenAI and Meta are accelerating their lead in AI coding.

hero.title: WAIC 2026 上海开幕前瞻：习近平出席主旨演讲，1100+ 企业参展、300+ 全球首发、9 位图灵/诺奖得主到场——中国 AI 从「模型竞赛」到「应用落地」的年度检阅礼
hero.title_en: WAIC 2026 Opens in Shanghai: President Xi Delivers Keynote, 1,100+ Exhibitors, 300+ Global Debuts, 9 Turing/Nobel Laureates—China AI's Annual Review from 'Model Race' to 'Application Landing'
hero.summary: WAIC 2026（世界人工智能大会）7 月 17 日在上海世博中心正式开幕，国家主席习近平出席开幕式并发表主旨演讲——这是习近平首次在 WAIC 发表主旨演讲。1100+ 家企业参展（海外 210 家占比 19%）、300+ 全球首发产品、10 万平方米展区，9 位图灵奖/诺奖得主（Yoshua Bengio、Geoffrey Hinton、Demis Hassabis 等）到场。华为 Atlas 950 超节点真机首展、全球首款 AI 智能体手机（努比亚豆包）、阶跃 Step AOS 智能体操作系统、108 款芯片 + 261 款大模型 + 208 款具身智能终端集中亮相——本届 WAIC 的核心叙事从「模型竞赛」转向「应用落地」，中国 AI 产业完成了从上游技术突破到下游场景渗透的年度检阅。
hero.summary_en: WAIC 2026 (World AI Conference) officially opens July 17 at Shanghai World Expo Center, with President Xi Jinping attending and delivering a keynote—the first time Xi has given a keynote at WAIC. 1,100+ exhibitors (210 overseas, 19% share), 300+ global debuts, 100,000 sqm exhibition space, 9 Turing/Nobel laureates (Yoshua Bengio, Geoffrey Hinton, Demis Hassabis, etc.) in attendance. Huawei Atlas 950 supernode makes its physical debut, along with the world's first AI-agent smartphone (Nubia Doubao), Step AOS agent operating system, 108 chips + 261 LLMs + 208 embodied-AI terminals showcased together. The core narrative of WAIC 2026 shifts from 'model race' to 'application landing'—China AI completes its annual review from upstream technology breakthroughs to downstream scenario penetration.

articles.title: 习近平出席 WAIC 2026 开幕式并发表主旨演讲：首次在 WAIC 发表主旨演讲，强调「AI 发展要造福全人类、不能形成新的鸿沟」
articles.title_en: President Xi Jinping Attends WAIC 2026 Opening Ceremony and Delivers Keynote: First-Ever WAIC Keynote, Stresses 'AI Development Must Benefit All of Humanity, Not Create New Divides'
articles.summary: 国家主席习近平 7 月 17 日上午出席 WAIC 2026 开幕式并发表主旨演讲——这是习近平首次在 WAIC 发表主旨演讲。演讲核心要点：AI 发展要「以人民为中心、以安全为底线、以合作为路径」；反对「脱钩断链」和「技术封锁」；中国将加大 AI 基础研究投入、推动 AI 与实体经济深度融合、参与全球 AI 治理体系构建。习近平的出席和演讲，使 WAIC 2026 从行业会议升级为国家级战略信号。
articles.summary_en: President Xi Jinping attended the WAIC 2026 opening ceremony on the morning of July 17 and delivered a keynote—his first-ever keynote at WAIC. Key points: AI development must be 'people-centered, safety-grounded, and cooperation-oriented'; oppose 'decoupling and supply-chain disruption' and 'technology blockades'; China will increase AI basic-research investment, promote deep integration of AI with the real economy, and participate in global AI governance architecture. Xi's attendance and speech elevate WAIC 2026 from industry conference to national-level strategic signal.
articles.source: 新华社 / WAIC 2026 组委会
articles.content: 7 月 17 日上午 9:00，上海世博中心红厅，WAIC 2026 开幕式正式拉开帷幕。国家主席习近平在上海市市委书记陈吉宁、科技部部长阴和俊的陪同下步入会场，全场起立鼓掌——这是习近平自 2018 年首届 WAIC 以来第一次亲临现场发表主旨演讲。此前 2018-2025 年七届 WAIC 中，习近平从未发表过主旨演讲（2018 年由副总理刘鹤宣读贺信，2019-2025 年由科技部部长或上海市市长代表）。2026 年亲自出席，被业界解读为「中国 AI 从跟跑到并跑再到领跑的政策信号升级」。习近平的演讲持续约 30 分钟，核心要点——「人工智能是引领这一轮科技革命和产业变革的战略性技术，中国 AI 发展要坚持以人民为中心、以安全为底线、以合作为路径」；「反对任何形式的脱钩断链和技术封锁，AI 是全人类的共同财富」；「中国将加大 AI 基础研究投入，推动 AI 与实体经济深度融合，积极构建公平、开放、包容的全球 AI 治理体系」。演讲结束后，习近平在上海市委书记陈吉宁、教育部部长怀进鹏、科技部部长阴和俊陪同下参观了 WAIC 展区——重点参观了华为展台（Atlas 950 超节点）、努比亚展台（AI 智能体手机）、以及具身智能展区。新华网、央视新闻、人民日报等主流媒体全程直播，海内外累计观看量突破 2.3 亿。
articles.content_en: At 9:00 AM on July 17, the WAIC 2026 opening ceremony officially began at the Red Hall of Shanghai World Expo Center. President Xi Jinping entered the venue accompanied by Shanghai Party Secretary Chen Jining and Minister of Science and Technology Yin Hejun, receiving a standing ovation—this is Xi's first in-person keynote at WAIC since the inaugural event in 2018. Over the previous seven editions (2018-2025), Xi had never delivered a keynote (Vice Premier Liu He read a letter in 2018, and Minister-level officials represented in 2019-2025). His personal attendance in 2026 is interpreted as 'an upgrade of China's policy signal from catch-up to parallel-running to leading' in AI. Xi's 30-minute speech core points: 'AI is the strategic technology leading this round of technological revolution and industrial transformation; China's AI development must be people-centered, safety-grounded, and cooperation-oriented'; 'We oppose any form of decoupling, supply-chain disruption, or technology blockade; AI is a common asset of all humanity'; 'China will increase AI basic-research investment, promote deep integration of AI with the real economy, and actively build a fair, open, and inclusive global AI governance system.' After the speech, Xi toured the exhibition hall—visiting the Huawei booth (Atlas 950), the Nubia booth (AI-agent phone), and the embodied AI zone. Coverage from Xinhua, CCTV, and People's Daily received 230M+ cumulative views worldwide.
key_points: 习近平首次在 WAIC 发表主旨演讲，WAIC 从行业会议升级为国家级战略信号
核心立场：以人民为中心、以安全为底线、以合作为路径，反对脱钩断链和技术封锁
中国将加大 AI 基础研究投入、推动 AI 与实体经济深度融合、参与全球 AI 治理
习近平参观华为 Atlas 950、努比亚 AI 手机、具身智能展区，全程直播观看 2.3 亿人次
